title: eriolaena hily
intro: Eriolaena hily, also known as the hily tree or hily flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Polynesian medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Eriolaena hily include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Eriolaena hily can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and infusates, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain health conditions.
